title: SearchAgentInputSpec
description: The structured task spec the worker writes for the bounded career-search-agent (agent_service._search_input_spec). The agent reads this file to learn the session_id, workspace, search contract, catalog and strategy context, and the expected output paths. Built by the worker, consumed by the career-discovery-operator skill.

session_id.description: Session the worker already created. The agent MUST NOT start/end it.

workspace_id.description: Workspace the session lives in; pass to every wrapper via --workspace-id.

raw_user_request.description: Free-text objective or user instruction for this discovery run.

profile_summary.description: Human-readable summary of the candidate profile.

discovery_intent.description: Structured search contract from the Intent Translator. Empty object when triggered via the legacy operator endpoint. Non-empty for user-facing /api/discovery-runs.

attempt_context.description: Per-attempt context injected by the Objective Controller (new path only). Absent for legacy operator runs. When present, the agent MUST: (1) avoid URLs and companies listed in seen_urls/seen_companies; (2) follow the pivot_hint strategy for this attempt.

max_attempts.description: Total max attempts for this objective.

target_new_jobs.description: Total new jobs the objective aims to insert.

remaining_target.description: Remaining new jobs still needed after previous attempts.

seen_companies.description: Company names already captured in previous attempts. Avoid searching these again unless the pivot_hint says otherwise.

seen_urls.description: Job posting URLs already processed in previous attempts. Do not re-capture.

previous_failure_summary.description: Human-readable summary of why the previous attempt did not meet the objective.

pivot_hint.description: LLM-generated strategy adjustment for this attempt. Follow it as a priority directive over the baseline DiscoveryIntent lanes.

catalog_context.description: Database-derived snapshot: existing job count and recently-seen companies.

strategy_context.description: Reflect-produced cross-run learnings: coverage gaps, source health, query patterns, key learnings, recommended next searches.

source_context.description: Paths to source configuration files (company_boards.yaml, source_policy.yaml).

max_queries.description: Hard query budget for the session.

max_pages.description: Hard fetch-page budget for the session.

coverage_report.description: Absolute path the agent must write coverage_report.md to; the gateway judges completion by its existence.

discovery_notes.description: Optional path for discovery_notes.md (new source discoveries, strategy observations).
